headline: Buy 5 Non-AI Stocks That Have Surged Year to Date to Tap Market Rally
summary: ADM, CASY, NUE, ROST and IMO have surged in 2026 as strong execution, expansion plans and earnings growth fuel gains beyond AI stocks.
